name: check
description: Task dashboard skill — /check prints current-state status across surfaces in one shot: `<UPPERCASE>.log.md` checkbox tasks (open vs done count + first 10 open items per log), `gh pr list` open PRs in this repo, `git status -sb` (uncommitted / ahead / behind), `git log --oneline -5` (recent merges). Read-only; no side effects. Triggers: /check · 상태 · 체크 · 현황 · status check · dashboard.
